name: should generate a fantasy points by play with per_game rate_type query
description: Test case for should generate a fantasy points by play with per_game rate_type query
expected_query: with "t8af6a5ef7b466cb7dac47160d3c2e87f" as materialized (select "player_gamelogs_year_2023"."pid", count(*) as "rate_type_total_count", array_agg(distinct player_gamelogs_year_2023.tm) as teams from "player_gamelogs_year_2023" left join "nfl_games" on "nfl_games"."esbid" = "player_gamelogs_year_2023"."esbid" where "player_gamelogs_year_2023"."active" = true and "nfl_games"."seas_type" in ('REG') and "nfl_games"."year" in (2023) group by "player_gamelogs_year_2023"."pid"), "rate_aggregate_c2d4f64d679c" as materialized (select "role_union"."pid" as "pid", SUM(role_union.pts) AS measure_total from (select nfl_plays.bc_pid AS pid, "nfl_plays"."esbid", COALESCE(rush_yds, 0) * 0.1 + COALESCE(rush_td::int, 0) * 6 AS pts from "nfl_plays" where nfl_plays.bc_pid IS NOT NULL and "nfl_plays"."seas_type" in ('REG') and "nfl_plays"."year" in (2023) and "nfl_plays"."play_type" not in ('NOPL') and "nfl_plays"."seas_type" in ('REG') union all select nfl_plays.psr_pid AS pid, "nfl_plays"."esbid", COALESCE(pass_yds, 0) * 0.04 + COALESCE(pass_td::int, 0) * 4 + COALESCE("int"::int, 0) * -1 AS pts from "nfl_plays" where nfl_plays.psr_pid IS NOT NULL and "nfl_plays"."seas_type" in ('REG') and "nfl_plays"."year" in (2023) and "nfl_plays"."play_type" not in ('NOPL') and "nfl_plays"."seas_type" in ('REG') union all select nfl_plays.trg_pid AS pid, "nfl_plays"."esbid", COALESCE(recv_yds, 0) * 0.1 + COALESCE(pass_td::int, 0) * 6 + COALESCE(comp::int, 0) * 1 AS pts from "nfl_plays" where nfl_plays.trg_pid IS NOT NULL and "nfl_plays"."seas_type" in ('REG') and "nfl_plays"."year" in (2023) and "nfl_plays"."play_type" not in ('NOPL') and "nfl_plays"."seas_type" in ('REG') union all select nfl_plays.player_fuml_pid AS pid, "nfl_plays"."esbid", -1 AS pts from "nfl_plays" where nfl_plays.player_fuml_pid IS NOT NULL and "nfl_plays"."seas_type" in ('REG') and "nfl_plays"."year" in (2023) and "nfl_plays"."play_type" not in ('NOPL') and "nfl_plays"."seas_type" in ('REG')) as "role_union" inner join "nfl_games" on "nfl_games"."esbid" = "role_union"."esbid" where "nfl_games"."seas_type" in ('REG') and "nfl_games"."year" in (2023) group by "role_union"."pid" having SUM(role_union.pts) > 0) select "player"."pid", player.first_name, player.last_name, CASE WHEN rosters_players.slot = 13 THEN 'injured_reserve' WHEN rosters_players.slot = 12 THEN 'practice_squad' WHEN rosters_players.slot IS NULL THEN 'free_agent' ELSE 'active_roster' END AS player_league_roster_status, rosters_players.slot, rosters_players.tid, rosters_players.tag, CAST(MAX(rate_aggregate_c2d4f64d679c.measure_total) AS DECIMAL) / NULLIF(CAST(MAX(t8af6a5ef7b466cb7dac47160d3c2e87f.rate_type_total_count) AS DECIMAL), 0) AS fantasy_points_from_plays_0, "player"."primary_position" from "player" left join "t8af6a5ef7b466cb7dac47160d3c2e87f" on "t8af6a5ef7b466cb7dac47160d3c2e87f"."pid" = "player"."pid" left join "rate_aggregate_c2d4f64d679c" on "rate_aggregate_c2d4f64d679c"."pid" = "player"."pid" left join "rosters_players" on "rosters_players"."pid" = "player"."pid" and "rosters_players"."year" = 2026 and "rosters_players"."week" = 0 and "rosters_players"."lid" = 1 group by player.first_name, player.last_name, rosters_players.slot, rosters_players.tid, rosters_players.tag, "player"."pid", "player"."last_name", "player"."first_name", "player"."primary_position" order by 8 DESC NULLS LAST, "player"."pid" asc limit 500
